translations.en: I'm looking for an affordable guesthouse.
translations.fr: Je cherche une maison d'hôtes abordable.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一家实惠的家庭旅馆。
translations.yue: 我搵緊一間實惠嘅民宿。
translations.he: אני מחפש בית הארחה במחיר סביר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một nhà nghỉ giá phải chăng.
translations.ar: أبحث عن بيت ضيافة بسعر معقول.
translations.hi: मैं सस्ता गेस्टहाउस ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et rimelig pensjonat.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari penginapan yang terjangkau.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett prisvärt pensionat.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et billigt pensionat.
translations.ja: 手頃なゲストハウスを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the noun 'Pension'.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Pension'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'; here meaning a boarding house/guesthouse.

sentences.target: Mein Vater geht nächstes Jahr in Pension.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ɡeːt ˈnɛçstəs jaːʁ ɪn pɛnˈzi̯oːn/

translations.de: Mein Vater geht nächstes Jahr in Pension.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ɡeːt ˈnɛçstəs jaːʁ ɪn pɛnˈzi̯oːn/
translations.en: My father is retiring next year.
translations.es: Mi padre se jubila el año que viene.
translations.fr: Mon père prend sa retraite l'année prochaine.
translations.it: Mio padre va in pensione l'anno prossimo.
translations.ru: Мой отец выйдет на пенсию в следующем году.
translations.pt: Meu pai vai se aposentar no ano que vem.
translations.he: אבא שלי יוצא לפנסיה בשנה הבאה.
translations.vi: Bố tôi sẽ nghỉ hưu vào năm sau.
translations.nl: Mijn vader gaat volgend jaar met pensioen.
translations.uk: Мій батько вийде на пенсію наступного року.
translations.hi: मेरे पिताजी अगले साल सेवानिवृत्त होंगे.
translations.pl: Mój tata przejdzie na emeryturę w przyszłym roku.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου θα βγει στη σύνταξη του χρόνου.
translations.nb: Faren min går av med pensjon neste år.
translations.id: Ayah saya akan pensiun tahun depan.
translations.sv: Min pappa går i pension nästa år.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu se pensionează anul viitor.
translations.cs: Můj táta půjde příští rok do důchodu.
translations.da: Min far går på pension næste år.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine nominative singular; modifies 'Vater'.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of 'geht'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive here, combining with a directional PP.
Attributive adjective, neuter accusative singular; modifies 'Jahr' in a temporal NP.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; with 'nächstes' forms a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial (accusative of time).
Preposition; with directional meaning here ('into'), typically governing accusative; introduces the PP 'in Pension' (entering a state).
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' in the idiomatic PP 'in Pension (gehen)' = to retire.

sentences.target: Die Pension hat nur drei freie Zimmer.
sentences.reading: /diː pɛnˈzi̯oːn hat nuːʁ dʁaɪ̯ ˈfʁaɪ̯ə ˈtsɪmɐ/

translations.de: Die Pension hat nur drei freie Zimmer.
translations.ipa: /diː pɛnˈzi̯oːn hat nuːʁ dʁaɪ̯ ˈfʁaɪ̯ə ˈtsɪmɐ/
translations.en: The guesthouse has only three free rooms.
translations.es: La pensión solo tiene tres habitaciones libres.
translations.fr: La maison d'hôtes n'a que trois chambres disponibles.
translations.it: La pensione ha solo tre camere libere.
translations.ko: 그 게스트하우스에는 빈 방이 세 개밖에 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家家庭旅馆只有三间空房。
translations.yue: 呢間民宿淨係得三間空房。
translations.ru: В этом гостевом доме осталось всего три свободных номера.
translations.pt: A pousada tem apenas três quartos disponíveis.
translations.he: בבית ההארחה יש רק שלושה חדרים פנויים.
translations.tr: Pansiyonda sadece üç boş oda var.
translations.vi: Nhà nghỉ chỉ còn ba phòng trống.
translations.ar: بيت الضيافة فيه ثلاث غرف शاغرة فقط.
translations.nl: Het pension heeft maar drie vrije kamers.
translations.uk: У цьому гостьовому будинку лишилося лише три вільні номери.
translations.hu: A panzióban csak három szabad szoba van.
translations.hi: गेस्टहाउस में सिर्फ तीन खाली कमरे हैं.
translations.pl: Pensjonat ma tylko trzy wolne pokoje.
translations.el: Ο ξενώνας έχει μόνο τρία διαθέσιμα δωμάτια.
translations.nb: Pensjonatet har bare tre ledige rom.
translations.id: Penginapan itu hanya memiliki tiga kamar kosong.
translations.sv: Pensionatet har bara tre lediga rum.
translations.ro: Pensiunea are doar trei camere libere.
translations.cs: Penzion má jen tři volné pokoje.
translations.da: Pensionatet har kun tre ledige værelser.
translations.fi: Majatalossa on vain kolme vapaata huonetta.
translations.ja: そのゲストハウスには空き部屋が三部屋しかありません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; marks 'Pension' as the subject.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'hat'; here meaning a boarding house/guesthouse.
Finite lexical verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object NP.
Focus particle/adverb limiting scope; modifies the quantity expressed by the numeral phrase.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Zimmer'; part of the accusative object NP.
Attributive adjective, plural accusative; agrees with 'Zimmer'.
Common noun, neuter plural; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Opa ist seit Juli in Pension.

translations.de: Opa ist seit Juli in Pension.
translations.en: Grandpa has been retired since July.
translations.es: Mi abuelo está jubilado desde julio.
translations.fr: Mon grand-père est à la retraite depuis juillet.
translations.it: Mio nonno è in pensione da luglio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爷爷从七月起就退休了。
translations.yue: 我阿爺由七月開始就退休咗。
translations.pt: Meu avô está aposentado desde julho.
translations.vi: Ông tôi đã nghỉ hưu từ tháng Bảy.
translations.nl: Mijn opa is sinds juli met pensioen.
translations.pl: Mój dziadek jest na emeryturze od lipca.
translations.el: Ο παππούς μου είναι στη σύνταξη από τον Ιούλιο.
translations.nb: Bestefar har vært pensjonist siden juli.
translations.id: Kakek saya sudah pensiun sejak Juli.
translations.sv: Min morfar är pensionär sedan juli.
translations.ro: Bunicul meu e pensionar din iulie.
translations.cs: Děda je od července v důchodu.
translations.da: Min bedstefar har været pensionist siden juli.
translations.fi: Isoisäni on ollut eläkkeellä heinäkuusta lähtien.
translations.ja: 祖父は7月から退職しています。

tokens.explanation: Common kinship noun, masculine nominative singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to predicative complements.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper noun (month name), dative singular; object of 'seit' in the temporal PP.
Preposition; with stative meaning here (location/state), typically governing dative; introduces 'in Pension' as a state.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'in' in a predicative PP indicating the state of being retired.

en: I'm looking for an affordable guesthouse.
My father is retiring next year.
The guesthouse has only three free rooms.
Grandpa has been retired since July.
